case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ROMERO, JORGE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, JORGE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-15-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-10-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
